item.title: Bad guy meme (original) || Deadplate Vincent Charbonneau . . . . Hi it’s been a while omg huh first post of 2026 ig I’ll try to post more frequently for y’all This video took me about 30 hours only in tweening so I hope it doesn’t flop😭 Hope y’all enjoy
